query: BizDraft complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: BizDraft — Draft any business agreement in 90 seconds. Free.
results.content:
BizDraft is built for small and independent business agreements — service agreements, contractor agreements, leases, and NDAs. Every draft is aware of both federal law and the laws of your state, across all 50 states. We don't cover personal agreements or high-stakes corporate transactions — that's intentional. BizDraft exists because small businesses and independent professionals deserve properly written agreements too.

Yes. Every suggested clause comes with Accept, Adjust, or Skip — one at a time. After that, the whole draft is yours to edit freely: change a clause, reword a section, remove anything that doesn't apply. [...] ⚠ Legal disclaimer: Agreements generated by BizDraft are AI-produced for informational purposes only. They do not constitute legal advice and do not create an attorney-client relationship. For any agreement of significant legal or financial importance, consult a qualified attorney before signing.

## What happens after the draft.

BizDraft handles the drafting. When you're ready to sign, send, or refine the document, these sister tools from airSlate take it the rest of the way — all free to try.

SignNow

SignNow is the eSignature solution built for your entire organization — giving the whole team everything they need to send and sign documents, without user limits or complex setup.

pdfFiller [...] Honest answers

## Questions worth asking.

Yes. No paywall, no trial, no credit card. There's no account because there's nothing on our side to sign into.

The agreement you draft lives in your browser tab, not on our server. Close the tab and it's gone on our side. We'll prompt you to download before you go.

A signed agreement is binding under the same rules as any other — both parties competent, clear terms, lawful purpose, signatures. The drafting tool doesn't change that.

What we won't claim is that any agreement is right for any deal. For high-stakes engagements, hand the Word file to your attorney before you sign. The agreement is yours to take wherever it needs to go.

results.title: Biz Draft
results.content:
Biz Draft Logo

# Draft Your Business Future

Biz Draft helps you create comprehensive, professional business plans with AI-powered assistance every step of the way.

## Start Your Business Plan

Create a new business plan from scratch with our guided process. Our AI will help you craft each section with professional insights.

Get started ## Explore Features

Discover how Biz Draft can transform your business planning process with AI-powered tools, templates, and expert guidance.

Learn more

## The 7 Essential Components of Your Business Plan

1

### Executive Summary

A concise overview of your business plan highlighting key points.

2

### Company Description

Detailed information about what your company does and what makes it unique.

3

### Market Analysis [...] 3

### Market Analysis

Research on your industry, market trends, and competitors.

4

### Organization & Management

Your business structure and the team that will make it successful.

5

### Service or Product Line

What you sell, how it benefits customers, and your R&D activities.

6

### Marketing & Sales

Your strategy to attract and retain customers.

### Financial Projections

Forecasts that demonstrate the financial viability of your business.

## Ready to Build Your Business Plan?

Join other entrepreneurs who have successfully launched their businesses with Biz Draft's AI-powered platform.

 Get Started for Free

results.title: Solving Problems With a Business: Returns, Refunds, and ...
results.content:
## Write a Letter

If you can’t resolve the problem by going back to the store or website, use this sample letter to write an effective complaint. When you write [...] ## Get Outside Help

If you’re not satisfied with a business’s response to your complaint [...] Include copies of relevant documents , like receipts, repair orders, and warranties. Keep the originals.
 Describe your next steps. Say how long you’ll wait for the business to answer. Give time for the business to act, and let it know you’ll report the matter to your state attorney general or state consumer protection office if you don’t hear by your deadline.
 Make a copy of your letter to keep. Send your letter by certified mail and ask for a return receipt. If you send your complaint letter online, print the screen that shows your letter or take a screenshot of your letter before you click “submit.”

# What’s Frustrating About: Company Problems

There are a lot of company problems. One is people getting paid. I do feel like the boss can pay you more. They can work harder! They can be nicer to there partner. Show your partner more love.

I think if you have a bad boss you should find a new job. Because if you are not happy in your work place. You might not be happy at home.
